arts.ttl: Barcelona star a summer target for Galatasaray
arts.sum: A member of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has made his way onto the radar of the transfer team at Galatasaray. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick singles Barcelona star out for special praise after Benfica clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Friday moved to lavish praise on Wojciech Szczęsny. This comes owing to the Pole’s performance in the Champions League in midweek. Szczęsny, for…

arts.ttl: Pedri to rest? Hansi Flick confirms plans to rotate against Osasuna
arts.sum: The Catalans played 70 minutes without 10 men in Lisbon and have another clash with Benfica and a monster league game away to Atlético Madrid next week, so it’s only natural to wonder if Hansi Flick will make changes to his side against an Osasuna team currently sitting in mid-table. Barcelona have no time to rest after their amazing win over Benfica in Champions League action in midweek and turn their focus to La Liga when they meet Osasuna at the Montjuïc Olympic Stadium on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: How much did Real Madrid & Barcelona earn for last season’s Champions League?
arts.sum: An insight into the financial rewards secured by Spanish football’s leading clubs for their participation in last season’s Champions League campaign has on Friday been forthcoming online. And it will…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star rated as 'Ballon d'Or contender' by national team coach
arts.sum: Multiple managers have recently hailed Barcelona's star man this season as one of the best players in the world.

arts.ttl: Barcelona handed injury boost for Osasuna clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Friday been afforded some altogether positive news on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Alejandro Balde trained normally alongside the rest of…

arts.ttl: Balde gives Flick fitness boost ahead of Barca vs Osasuna
arts.sum: Alejandro Balde trained as normal with Barcelona on Friday and looks set to be included in the squad for the clash against Osasuna . However, it seems that Balde is OK and will be eligible to play in Saturday’s La Liga match at Montjuic.
The LaLiga title race is becoming a gripping contest and Liam Flin is previewing all 10 games in the Spanish top flight in week 27.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick: 'We'll play the best possible team'
arts.sum: He also indicated that both he and his coaching staff – who he rates as "wonderful" – think it's "important to have the best possible team on the playing field" . "I think we have a good philosophy, think positively, pressing and focusing on how we want to play", he went on to add, before reaffirming that he thinks his team has reached "another level in terms of team performance", and that there is a "wonderful atmosphere" in the dressing room.

arts.ttl: Ter Stegen could return from injury sooner than first feared
arts.sum: According to Sport, Germany's first-choice goalkeeper, Marc-André ter Stegen, could potentially return to action in April.
